name: MAS Project Guardian (Asset Tokenization Pilots)
jurisdiction: Singapore (with cross-border pilots: UK FCA, Japan FSA, Switzerland FINMA)
chain: Multiple (Ethereum, Polygon, Avalanche, ConsenSys Quorum per pilot)

issuer.name: Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) + industry consortium

regulator.name: MAS + cross-border partners (UK FCA, Japan FSA, Switzerland FINMA)

summary: MAS's institutional asset tokenization pilot program. Multiple workstreams: tokenized funds (JPMorgan + Apollo + WisdomTree), FX/cross-currency (DBS, JPM, SBI), wealth management (UOB + Marketnode + Schroders), trade finance (StraitsX + Ant International). 2024-2025 expansion includes formal collaboration with UK FCA, Japan FSA, and Switzerland FINMA — making Project Guardian the most internationally coordinated tokenization regulatory framework. Distinct from Project Orchid (which focuses on retail purpose-bound money). Direct counterpart to HKMA Project Ensemble; the two programs increasingly cross-reference each other.

sources.title: MAS: Global industry pilots on asset tokenization (2024 update)

underlying_asset: Various per pilot: tokenized funds (money market, equity, credit), tokenized FX, trade finance receivables, wealth management products.
reserve_composition: Per pilot; institutional-grade backing typical of underlying asset class.
secondary_market: Per pilot; some streams aim for cross-border interoperability.
upgrade_authority: MAS framework governance; participants implement per institutional governance.

timeline.event: First live tokenized FX transaction: JPM Onyx + DBS + SBI
Phase 2 expansion announced; cross-border with UK FCA, Japan FSA
Cross-border tokenized fund interoperability pilots active
